name: golang-boost
description: Component-aligned Claude Code skill bundle for github.com/xgodev/boost. One plugin, one skill per boost component (28 total): boot sequence, log/config/publisher/cache wrappers, model/errors, factories with framework-shipped examples (Echo, Resty, Pub/Sub, Mongo, Cassandra, Redis, Elasticsearch, Kafka, AWS umbrella, gRPC client+server, gocloud.dev pub/sub), function bootstrap + Pub/Sub/NATS/Kafka adapters, middleware stack, extra middleware/health/multiserver, fx modules, and a maintainer guide. Every skill cites the boost source paths it teaches; factory skills cite the canonical examples shipped under each component's examples/ dir.
